name: Face on Lie
overview: Han Yuxi, a girl who works alone in a big city, is kind and talented, but she suffers from outside malice because of her appearance. After experiencing multiple blows in emotion and life, she had the idea of cosmetic surgery, and a conspiratorial hand was quietly changing her life ...

trailers.title: 《谎颜》预告PV：求生求死，终究还是因为这张脸
